Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

BRM 2, 10 [Sale of slave][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

mman-nu-ki-i-d<<60>>-DIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60 ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂

o 22

ša₂ ŠU-MIN 15-šu₂ a-na MU ša₂ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60 šaṭ-rat a-na

o 33

1 MA.NA KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ri-MEŠ ša₂ ma-lik-sa-an-dar bab-ba-nu-u₂-tu₂

o 44

a-na ŠAM₂ TIL-MEŠ a-na mni-din-tu₄ DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 a-na u₄-mu

o 55

ṣa-a-tu₄ it-ta-din KU₃.BABBAR a-na 1 MA.NA ŠAM₂ fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂

o 66

MU-MEŠ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60 ina ŠU-MIN mni-din-tu₄ DUMU ša₂

o 77

mni-din-tu₄-d60 ma-ḫir e-ṭir₃ u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi

o 88

fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂ MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂

o 99

mana-GAL-ka-d60 u mki-tu-d60 DUMU-šu₂ u₂-mar-raq-ma-ʾa a-na mni-din-tu₄

o 1010

DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 ina-an-din pu-ut la lu₂šir₃-ku-u₂-tu₂

o 1111

la lu₂šu-ša₂-nu-u₂-tu₂ la lu₂DUMU DU₃u₂-tu₂ la lu₂ARAD LUGALu₂-tu₂ la E₂ ANŠE.KUR.RA

o 1212

la E₂ gišGU.ZA u la E₂ gišGIGIR ša₂ fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂ MU-MEŠ

o 1313

a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60 u mki-tu-d60 DUMU-šu₂

o 1414

na-šu-u₂ pu-ut a-ḫa-miš a-na mu-ru-qu ša₂ fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂

Reverse
r 1r 1

MU-MEŠ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT u mki-tu-d60 DUMU-šu₂ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ na-šu-u₂

r 22

pu-ut la ZAḪ₂ ša₂ fina-DU₃-dna-na-a GEME₂ MU-MEŠ a-di 100 u₄-mu mman-nu-ki-i-[dDIL-BAT]

r 33

⸢u⸣ mki-tu-d60 DUMU-šu₂ na-šu-u₂

(witnesses)
r 44

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 55

mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši A mE₂.KUR-za-kir md60-DIN-su-E DUMU ša₂ md60-DU-A A mE₂.KUR-za-kir

r 66

md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ mtat-tan-nu mdUTU-SUR

r 77

DUMU ša₂ mba-la-ṭu md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 m⸢ni-din⸣-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-AD-URI₃

r 88

mman-nu-i-qa-pu DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU DUMU ⸢ša₂⸣ [md]60-AD-URI₃ mdINANA-MU-KAM₂

r 99

DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-⸢GI⸣ [mni]-⸢din⸣-tu₄-<d60> DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60

r 1010

mri-ḫat-dINANA DUMU ša₂ mman-nu-i-qa-pu mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT

r 1111

mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdIŠKUR-MU md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu u mdIŠKUR-MU DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ md60-AD-URI₃

r 1212

ina a-ša₂-bi ša₂ fNIN-su-nu DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mu₂-bar DAM mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT ša₂-ṭar lu₂!SAR!-ir

r 1313

mKI-d60-ḪE₂.NUN lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60-EN-šu₂-nu UNUGki itiKIN U₄ 2-KAM₂ MU 37-KAM₂

r 1414

mat-ti-i-ku-su u mse-lu-ku LUGAL-MEŠ

mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT

r.e. i 33

lu₂na-[din-an] ⸢LU₂⸣-ut-ti₃ MU-MEŠ; ša₂ LUGAL

(signature)
r.e. ii 11

un-qa mki-tu-d60

un-qa sa-um-bu-lu1

mdIŠKUR-MU-<MUnu>

r.e. v 11

un-qa f⸢NIN⸣-su-[nu]

(impression of seal = AUWE 19, 0929)
r.e. v 22

DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mu₂-bar

1sa-um-bu-lu = symbolon, Monerie 2014, 198.
